name: a4-pi-settings-writeback
title: A4 Pi原生设置页与settings写回
description: Pi配置设置页: 读~/.pi/agent/settings.json+.pi/settings.json,改动经Worker SettingsManager写回(全局或项目级)。覆盖旧约束App不改pi全局配置。字段:默认模型defaultProvider/defaultModel,sessionDir,packages路径展示,compaction,retry,transport,steer模式,enabledModels。安全红线:只改pi官方字段,不手写JSON。依赖: tui-replacement-and-adapters.md §2.5
creator: justhil
